scripts.dev:gateway: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/api-gateway/main.js
scripts.dev:auth: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/auth-service/main.js
scripts.dev:catalog: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/catalog-service/main.js
scripts.dev:cart: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/cart-service/main.js
scripts.dev:promo: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/promo-service/main.js
scripts.dev:orders: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/order-service/main.js
scripts.dev:delivery: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/delivery-service/main.js
scripts.dev:analytics: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- node dist/apps/analytics-service/main.js
scripts.dev:all: npm run build && dotenv -e ../.env -- concurrently -n gateway,auth,catalog,cart,promo,orders,delivery,analytics -c cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta,red,white,gray "node dist/apps/api-gateway/main.js" "node dist/apps/auth-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/catalog-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/cart-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/promo-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/order-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/delivery-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/analytics-service/main.js"
scripts.start:all: dotenv -e ../.env -- concurrently -n gateway,auth,catalog,cart,promo,orders,delivery,analytics -c cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta,red,white,gray "node dist/apps/api-gateway/main.js" "node dist/apps/auth-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/catalog-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/cart-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/promo-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/order-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/delivery-service/main.js" "node dist/apps/analytics-service/main.js"
